symptom: a newborn skull that looked oddly shaped
hook: the skull had grown into three strange lobes
whatYouSee: A baby skull split into three bulging lobes with a deep pinch at the temples and forehead.
whyItMatters: The skull seams fused before birth so the growing brain pushed the bone out into whatever gaps were left.
treatment: Surgery early in life reshapes the skull and gives the growing brain room.
takeaway: A skull can only grow where its seams still let it.

generated.threadsCaption:
A newborn came in and the shape of the head looked wrong from across the room.

Then the X-ray loaded 😳

And the skull had grown into three strange lobes.

Quick diagnosis challenge 🩻

What is the most likely diagnosis?

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Cloverleaf skull

👀 What you see:
A baby skull split into three bulging lobes with a deep pinch at the temples and forehead.

💊 Treatment:
Surgery early in life reshapes the skull and gives the growing brain room.

🦴 Why it matters:
The skull seams fused before birth so the brain pushed the bone out into whatever gaps were left. It is a rare form of craniosynostosis.
